title: Create: Horizons
description: A modpack about exploration and automation, themed around Create and Cobblemon!
body:
![The Create: Horzions modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/569d0b2755e051a32acf64d4e6ab227740c82124.png)

### Create: Horizons is a modpack designed for multiplayer that was originally just made for me and my friends that I decided to release publicly since I spent so much time working on it!
---

The modpack's progression is mostly focused on create and cobblemon, with lots of custom compatibility that I made for cobblemon so that all of the medicinal items and pokeballs can be automated.

![Automated ultra ball assembly recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b979e6b61dcf17250beca0f283e1efa4c4ec5a76.png)

---
I also went ahead and rebalanced a lot of the food from [Bountiful Fares](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares) since I thought that some meals needed heavy nerfs and others buffed to account for how hard it was to get the ingredients and the hunger points/effects that they gave.

![Stone stew nerf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/128fd8e8bbb242824b0b1b665d70627e424e9f8c.png)

---
I also made a ton of compatibility between many of the other mods including pokemon spawning for all of the new biomes in the modpack ([Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) Cobblemon compatibility has been added to the main mod !!) and lots of other things that give the pack a much more polished feel than just smushing a bunch of mods together until it stops crashing.

![Pokemon spawning in Nature's Spirit biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a31bbe3e14c6ef80c64dae9e06b1249f1f6b9f1.png)
---
### Datapacks used (some pokemon removed):
- [Cavalier's Coalossal Cobblemons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cavscobblemons)
> Adds the Hatterene line
- [Cobble Cats](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-cats)
> Adds Skitty line, Glameow line, Espurr, Meowstick, Purrloin line, Zeraora (no nether star loot drop), Stunky line, Litleo line
- [Hidden Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon)
> Adds Swablu line, Kartana, Zygarde, Shuppet line, Snom line, Roaring Moon
- [Cobble Remodels](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-remodels)
- [Vivillon Pride Patterns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vivillon-pride-patterns)
### Resource Packs used:
- [Xaero's Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeroscobblemon/versions)

Special thanks to IndieAlch for helping me with making the quests!

p.s to use this on a server, you will have to remove the `sushi bar` mod from the pack otherwise it will crash. also it is best practice to remove any client-side only mods from the server to reduce the chance of issues. i may release a server only pack later down the line, but no promises! i am a little burnt out after working on this
